title: rubus rivularis var. biserratus
intro: Rubus rivularis var. biserratus, also known as the biserrate riverbank raspberry, is a plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus rivularis var. biserratus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against cell damage. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
